allow: Bash(CLAUDE_CODE_TMPDIR=/tmp php artisan tinker --execute="echo DB::select\('SHOW COLUMNS FROM sessions'\)[2]->Type;")

Bash(CLAUDE_CODE_TMPDIR=/tmp php artisan tinker '--execute=foreach\(DB::select\('\\''SHOW COLUMNS FROM sessions'\\''\) as $i => $col\) echo $i.'\\'': '\\''.$col->Field.'\\'' => '\\''.$col->Type.PHP_EOL;')
Bash(CLAUDE_CODE_TMPDIR=/tmp php artisan tinker '--execute=foreach\(DB::select\('\\''SHOW COLUMNS FROM sessions'\\''\) as $col\) echo $col->Field.'\\'' => '\\''.$col->Type.PHP_EOL;')
